particulars.description: (A) freehold land shown edged red on the title plan being mossley victoria spinning mills, mossley registered at hm land registry under title number GM833853;. (B) freehold land shown edged red on the title plan being land adjoining queen street mills, two mills lane, mossley, ashton-under-lyne registered at hm land registry under title number MAN313931; and. (C) freehold land shown edged red on the title plan being queen street mill and longlands mill, queen street, mossley, ashton-under-lyne registered at hm land registry under title number GM673812.
